utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these categories. Each one is fully detailed: health_coverage covers both physical and mental health with cost breakdowns, property_coverage specifies home/contents-type protection with costs, travel_coverage includes travel insurance with detailed features and costs, additional_services lists enhancement options with costs, and total_budget shows a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items appear complete and properly specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: physical health, mental health, property coverage, and travel coverage, plus some additional services. To map to ground-truth ratings, we match by coverage type and features. For physical_health (monthly €85, preventive care, telemedicine, psychiatry), the best match in the ground truth with similar cost and features is 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' with a rating of 10. For mental_health (€25, stress management, family therapy, psychiatry), the closest affordable option is 'CareCo Basic Plan' (rating 10) since other options cost significantly more. For property_coverage (home_and_equipment, €40, includes business equipment, electronics, natural disaster coverage), the best match is 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' (rating 10). For travel_coverage (adventure_and_professional_travel, €32, adventure sports, medical evacuation, business protection), the matching plan is 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 10) under mobility_coverage. Additional services include Telemedicine and Wellness Programs; Telemedicine matches 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 10), and Wellness Programs matches 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3).
